task_completion.description: Open the credit card rewards analysis spreadsheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Calc is open displaying the file 'cc_rewards_analysis.ods'.

In the Transactions sheet, previously blank categories for merchants like Shell Gas Station, Starbucks, Albertsons, Outback Steakhouse, or PF Changs are filled with appropriate categories (e.g., Gas, Dining, Groceries).

task_completion.description: Identify the highest-reward card for each transaction
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column in the spreadsheet (likely in the Transactions sheet) explicitly lists the best credit card to use for each transaction based on its category.

task_completion.description: Compare actual versus optimal rewards and calculate opportunity cost
task_completion.visual_evidence: Calculations showing 'Actual Rewards', 'Optimal Rewards', and/or the 'Opportunity Cost' (the difference between optimal and actual rewards) for the transactions.

task_completion.description: Create a decision matrix for future purchases
task_completion.visual_evidence: A summary table or matrix (likely on the Analysis sheet) mapping each spending category (Groceries, Gas, Dining, Travel, General) to the recommended credit card.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Calc GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the LibreOffice Calc application interface, not just running terminal commands to modify the file.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas for calculations
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in LibreOffice Calc shows formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, IF, SUM, MAX, or basic arithmetic) being used to calculate rewards or determine cards, rather than just hardcoded numbers.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the spreadsheet to build the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen switching between sheets (Transactions, Card_Details, Analysis) and progressively building the tables and calculations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: File: /home/ga/Documents/cc_rewards_analysis.ods (3 sheets: Transactions, Card_Details, Analysis). Blank categories to fix: Shell Gas Station (Gas), Starbucks (Dining), Albertsons (Groceries), Outback Steakhouse (Dining), PF Changs (Dining). Reward rates: Chase Freedom (5% groceries, 1% other), Discover (5% gas, 1% other), Amex Blue Preferred (6% groceries, 3% gas, 1% other), Citi Double Cash (2% all). Optimal cards by category: Groceries -> Amex Blue Preferred (6%), Gas -> Discover (5%), Dining/Travel/General -> Citi Double Cash (2%). The agent must calculate actual vs optimal rewards and opportunity cost.
